judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the first required action to move to fresh air, but misses the required immediate action to assist breathing if needed and weakens escalation by saying to call only if breathing is difficult or symptoms persist instead of immediately. The vomiting/by-mouth warning is unsupported for this inhalation scenario. Wording is concise and usable.
